prompt:
Cozy reading nook variation — a photorealistic 1:1 lifestyle photograph: a glowing-skin woman in her late 20s sitting on a low wood window-seat in a sunlit modern home, late afternoon. Knees drawn up loosely, a soft chunky knit throw across her lap. She lifts ONE dark sugar-dusted sea moss gummy CUBE between her thumb and index finger toward her parted lips with a soft smile, mid-bite. She wears a relaxed oversized cream waffle-knit sweater pulled off one shoulder, with soft cream lounge pants, hair loosely waved with a few flyaway strands, fresh-faced no makeup.

A WARM SHAFT OF DIRECT NATURAL SUNLIGHT pours through a tall window directly onto the JAR sitting on the wood window-seat beside her — the sunlight visibly hits the jar's front label, catching the teal/cyan and yellow accents, the bold yellow lettering, and grazing the curved black plastic with a clean bright rim-light. The label is the brightest most clearly-lit element in the lower portion of the frame. Beside the jar sits a small ceramic dish holding 5-6 more sugar-dusted gummy CUBES, also bathed in the sunlight. A few loose gummy cubes scattered on the wood next to the dish. The jar must match the provided reference image — black plastic jar with teal/cyan and yellow accents, front label reading 'DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies, TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE, 60 GUMMIES, DIETARY SUPPLEMENT', side panel reading 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend' in a vertical teal strip, lid off, fully legible, recognizable.

Background: a softly out-of-focus warm-modern interior — a stack of linen throws on a chair, a single tall potted fiddle-leaf plant, a fluffy beige rug, soft white wall. The tall window with sheer linen curtains drawn aside.

Lighting: directional warm golden-hour sunlight from the window directly on BOTH the jar AND the woman's face/hand — the same beam wraps both subject and product so they sit in the same light environment, integrating naturally. Color grade is warm, creamy, editorial wellness-brand feel (Goop / Athletic Greens / Alo).

Framing: square 1:1, three-quarter view of the woman seated, gummy held in the upper-third near her face, jar prominent in the lower-third on the window-seat with sunlight directly on its label. Subject and product both clearly recognizable.

Style: hyper-realistic photography, 50mm look, f/2.0 shallow depth, natural unretouched skin texture with a soft natural glow, no AI artifacts, no extra fingers.
